title: Activate DumbbellFlow
description: Follow these simple steps to activate your DumbbellFlow application

step1.title: Visit Activation Portal
step1.description: Go to the DumbbellFlow activation portal to get your license key

step2.title: Copy Your License Key
step2.description: Log in and copy your license key from the portal as shown below
step2.imageAlt: Screenshot showing where to copy the license key

step3.title: Activate Your App
step3.description: Paste your license key below to activate DumbbellFlow

offlineExpiry.message_one: Your license expires in {{count}} day. Contact your vendor to renew.
offlineExpiry.message_other: Your license expires in {{count}} days. Contact your vendor to renew.

airgapped.title: Activate DumbbellFlow
airgapped.description: Share your hardware ID with your vendor to receive an activation code
airgapped.hwidDescription: Send this ID to your vendor — they will generate an activation code for your machine
airgapped.codePlaceholder: Enter the activation code you received

trialBanner.message_one: Your free trial expires in {{count}} day. Subscribe to keep access.
trialBanner.message_other: Your free trial expires in {{count}} days. Subscribe to keep access.

expired.title: Your free trial has ended
expired.description: Subscribe to continue managing your gym with DumbbellFlow.
